examples: A dye decolorizing fungus strain WZ 2 was isolated from sludge and it was very effective to decolorize different dyes.
In the third part of experiment, the active carbon and aluminium sulphate, as well as microbes are used to decolorize the molasses wastewater.
Manganese ore (PGM) and powder active carbon (PAC) are used in static experiment to decolorize dyestuffs Rhodamine B and methyl orange wastewater.
